hero.name: Yishai Kaminsky
hero.title: IT Manager & Technology Specialist
hero.subtitle: 17+ years of experience in IT management, cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity, and enterprise support. Building AI-powered tools and automation in my spare time.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm an IT professional with 17+ years of experience spanning IT management, cloud services, cybersecurity, and enterprise support. My career includes roles at Profero, abra, Claroty, Microsoft, and Secure Islands — working with organizations from startups to major enterprises across Israel and internationally.
about.bio2: Beyond my professional IT work, I'm passionate about AI and building intelligent automation tools. I develop projects involving multi-agent systems, smart CRMs, and AI-powered applications. I'm especially excited about Hebrew-first AI tools and making technology accessible.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you.
